raw_brief: Build a landing page for a browser-based CSV export utility. Users paste a URL or connect a data source, choose export options, and download a CSV. The tool is self-serve, inexpensive, and used by marketers, operations teams, and founders who need a quick export without engineering help.
optional_business_context: Self-serve SaaS with a free trial and paid plans.
optional_known_constraints: Must work well on mobile and desktop. Avoid heavy brand storytelling.
optional_user_preferences: Functional first, polished but not decorative.
